title: [MTR3/4] KCR&HK Tramways Pack
description: This Resource Pack adds KCR Trains and Hong Kong Tram for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![KCR Through Train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea63f275fb58e6a2bef6e6656bc22f5dd491bb6d_0.webp)

![HK Tramways](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910a8932171aa0a67132e94b8cf46745ee05c2f6.png)

## KCR&HK Tramways Pack for Minecraft Transit Railway

### Introduction
This resource pack adds KCR trains & HK Tramways for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** (MTR3, MTR4) and **Nemo's Transit Expansion** for MTR3 version (NTE)

Sounds are Provided by Szandorthe13th (Trains)/LX9702 (Tram)

### Terms & Disclaimer
This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

Need to jump to ride double-decker trains/tram (upper decker version) in MTR4

### Contents
* KTT KCR Through Train (5m/6m panto Lok2000, Carriage)
* KCR 1950 Coach
* Hong Kong Tram
* HK Tram Railway sign
* KCR G26 Locomotive
